title: lemaireocereus hollianus
intro: Lemaireocereus hollianus, also known as the 'Night-blooming Cereus', is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lemaireocereus hollianus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the flowers and leaves, which can then be infused in water to create a tea or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
